summary: Backend testing for Guest Portal endpoints (mobile app support). 14/16 tests passed (87.5%). Fixed 2 bugs in loyalty/account endpoints. 1 critical issue: service_requests table missing in Supabase.

critical.issue: Table 'service_requests' does not exist in Supabase database. Error: PGRST205 - Could not find the table 'public.service_requests' in the schema cache
critical.fix: Create 'service_requests' table in Supabase with columns: id (uuid), hotel_id (uuid), guest_id (uuid), room_number (text), service_type (text), service_name (text), notes (text), priority (text), status (text), created_at (timestamptz)

passed_tests: POST /api/guest-portal/access - Lowercase code normalized to uppercase
GET /api/guest-portal/reservations/{guest_id} - Non-existent guest returns empty list
GET /api/guest-portal/services/{hotel_id} - Returns 8 hotel services (room service, spa, concierge, etc.)
GET /api/guest-portal/requests/{guest_id} - Returns empty list (table may not exist)
GET /api/guest-portal/loyalty/{guest_id} - Returns loyalty info with member, tiers, rewards
GET /api/guest-portal/account/{guest_id} - Returns account balance and transactions
POST /api/guest-portal/booking - Returns 400 when no rooms available (expected)
Integration flow - Complete guest portal flow (login → reservations → services → account → loyalty)
action_items: CREATE TABLE service_requests in Supabase with columns: id (uuid PK), hotel_id (uuid), guest_id (uuid), room_number (text), service_type (text), service_name (text), notes (text), priority (text), status (text default 'pending'), created_at (timestamptz default now())
critical_code_review_comments: service_requests table is missing - endpoint POST /api/guest-portal/service-request will crash
GET /api/guest-portal/services returns static hardcoded services list (not from database)
Loyalty tiers and rewards have fallback defaults if database tables are empty
seed_data_creation: Used existing test reservation with code HESFC0FAA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest portal endpoints mostly working. Fixed error handling for non-existent guests in loyalty/account endpoints. Only issue is service_requests table missing in Supabase - needs to be created before POST /api/guest-portal/service-request will work.

bugs_fixed.issue: Supabase .single().execute() raises exception when no rows found instead of returning None
bugs_fixed.fix: Added try/except wrapper to properly return 404

bugs_fixed.issue: Same as above - .single().execute() exception not handled
bugs_fixed.fix: Added try/except wrapper to properly return 404

service_requests_issue.root_cause: The endpoint POST /api/guest-portal/service-request tries to insert into table 'service_requests' which does not exist in Supabase
service_requests_issue.mitigation: Create the table 'service_requests' in Supabase database
